attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SAF_INVOICE_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SAF_HEADER_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SAF_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SAF_SECTION, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.PERCENTAGE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.TAX_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.FREIGHT_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.TOTAL_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.ERP_CM_NUMBER, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.ERP_DM_NUMBER, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.APPLICATION_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SPECIAL_COMMENTS, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.TAX_FLAG, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.TAX_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.REBILL_INCLUDE_FREIGHT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.REBILL_TAX_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.REBILL_FREIGHT_YN, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.RECEIVABLE_TRX_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.ADJUST_REASON, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL,
 (
 select SAF_INVOICE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL
 minus
 select SAF_INVOICE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SAF_INVOICE_ID = STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.SAF_INVOICE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_XXICM_SAF_INVOICES_ALL)
